title: Add warning/error if a signal is driven by both concurrent and continuous assignment

features.name: variable driven by both procedural initialization and continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include a signal that is both initialized at declaration and also driven by a continuous assignment, creating a driver conflict

features.name: delayed continuous assignment on signal
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment with a delay specifier (#N) applied to a signal

features.name: variable initialization at declaration
features.description: Code should include a variable with initialization at declaration using procedural assignment
